SEARCH

Package neqsim.process.safety.hazid

package neqsim.process.safety.hazid
ISO 17776 Major Accident Hazard (MAH) catalogue and bow-tie skeleton builder.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.safety
     
  • Class
    Description
    FMEAWorksheet
    Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA) worksheet with Risk Priority Number (RPN) scoring.
    FMEAWorksheet.FMEAEntry
    One row of an FMEA worksheet.
    HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator
    Auto-populates HAZOP worksheet consequence and safeguard columns by mapping each guide-word/parameter deviation to the NeqSim calculation that quantifies the scenario.
    HazopConsequenceFinding
    A single quantified HAZOP consequence finding produced by HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.quantify(neqsim.process.processmodel.ProcessSystem, HazopQuantificationLimits).
    HazopConsequenceFinding.Verdict
    Deterministic verdict for a quantified deviation.
    HazopConsequenceMapping
    Immutable mapping of a single HAZOP guide-word/parameter deviation to the NeqSim calculation that quantifies its consequence, the applicable industry standard, and a typical safeguard.
    HazopQuantificationLimits
    Design limits used by HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.quantify(neqsim.process.processmodel.ProcessSystem, neqsim.process.safety.hazid.HazopQuantificationLimits) to turn a computed consequence value into a deterministic PASS / EXCEEDS verdict.
    HAZOPTemplate
    Hazard and Operability (HAZOP) study template — applies guide-words to process variables for a single node and stores deviations, causes, consequences, safeguards and recommendations.
    HAZOPTemplate.GuideWord
    Standard HAZOP guide-words.
    HAZOPTemplate.HAZOPDeviation
    One row of a HAZOP worksheet.
    HAZOPTemplate.Parameter
    Standard HAZOP process parameters.
    MahBowTieBuilder
    Builds a BowTieModel skeleton for a given MahType, pre-populated with the typical threats, consequences, and barrier classes from MahCatalogue.
    MahCatalogue
    Catalogue of typical threats, consequences and barrier classes for each MahType, as suggested by ISO 17776.
    MahType
    ISO 17776 Major Accident Hazard categories for offshore production installations.
    StidHazopDataSource
    Normalized STID and P&ID-to-HAZOP JSON bridge that builds HAZOPTemplate nodes from externally normalized evidence.
